query: What patterns appear in how I describe my mood over the last few months?

gold.answer: Your mood dips midweek (especially Tuesday/Wednesday) and lifts on weekends; the lifts consistently co-occur with exercise or outdoor activity, and the low points cluster around work deadlines.
claim_set: weekend lifts co-occur with exercise or outdoor activity
low points cluster around work deadlines

metadata.note: Open pattern-synthesis; gold is a 4-claim set scored by claim-recall. No single doc states the pattern.
